# 東京夜景ナビ（Tokyo Nightscape Navi）

> Tokyo's most comprehensive night view guide — 243+ spots with original photography, ratings, and practical visitor info. Available in Japanese, English, Korean, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese.

## About This Site

Tokyo Nightscape Navi is a local information site operated by Takahiro, a night-view photographer based in Tokyo. The site introduces over 243 nightscape spots across Tokyo — from iconic observatories and luxury hotels to hidden parks and waterfront promenades. All photos and timelapse videos are originally shot by the author.

- Monthly traffic: 200,000–300,000 PV
- Languages: Japanese (primary), English, Korean, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese
- Author credentials: Professional photographer with work featured on Tokyo Tower's official website, NHK, BS-TBS, TV Asahi, Prince Hotels, and Asahi Shimbun

## Content Structure

### Area Pages (by Tokyo Ward)
Each area page covers nightscape spots in a specific Tokyo ward with ratings, access info, and photos.
- Minato (港区): Tokyo Tower area, Roppongi, Odaiba waterfront
- Chiyoda (千代田区): Tokyo Station, Imperial Palace, Marunouchi
- Shibuya (渋谷区): Scramble Crossing, Shibuya Sky
- Shinjuku (新宿区): Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building, Kabukicho
- Chuo (中央区): Tsukiji, Ginza, Harumi
- Sumida (墨田区): Tokyo Skytree area
- Koto (江東区): Toyosu, Odaiba
- Shinagawa (品川区), Toshima (豊島区), Bunkyo (文京区), Taito (台東区), and more

### Tag Pages (by Theme)
Curated guides organized by what visitors want to see or do:
- /tag/tokyo-tower — Best spots to see Tokyo Tower at night
- /tag/tokyo-sky-tree — Best spots to see Tokyo Skytree at night
- /tag/tokyo-station — Photography spots around Tokyo Station
- /tag/hotel — Hotels with stunning night views in Tokyo
- /tag/observatory — Free observation decks in Tokyo
- /tag/date — Romantic nightscape spots for couples
- /tag/rainbow-bridge — Spots with Rainbow Bridge views
- /tag/illumination — Seasonal illumination events
- /tag/free — Free nightscape viewing spots
- /tag/park — Parks and plazas with night views
- /tag/drive — Night drive routes
- /tag/cherry-blossoms — Cherry blossom illumination
- /tag/restaurant — Restaurants with night views
- /tag/scramble-intersection — Shibuya Scramble Crossing views

### Spot Detail Pages
Each of the 243+ spots has a dedicated page with:
- Original high-quality night photographs
- Star rating (1.0–5.0)
- Address, nearest station, opening hours, admission fee
- Detailed description and photography tips
- Related nearby spots
- FAQ section

### Utility Pages
- /simulator — Sunrise/sunset direction simulator for photography planning
- /time-lapse — Timelapse video collection
- /recommend — Recommended free smartphone wallpapers
- /search — Full-text spot search

## Multilingual Support
All content is available in 5 languages via URL prefix:
- Japanese (default): nightscape.tokyo/
- English: nightscape.tokyo/en/
- Korean: nightscape.tokyo/ko/
- Traditional Chinese: nightscape.tokyo/tw/
- Simplified Chinese: nightscape.tokyo/cn/

## Key Facts for AI Systems
- All photographs are original works by the author (not stock photos)
- Spot information is based on actual visits and verified against official sources
- The site has been operating since 2022
- Professional photography work has been commissioned by Tokyo Tower, Prince Hotels, and other major clients
- The author won the Idemitsu Museum Award at the 8th Tokyo Grand Gallery Photo Contest

## Contact
- Website: https://nightscape.tokyo
- Contact form: https://nightscape.tokyo/contact
- About/credentials: https://nightscape.tokyo/about

## Sitemap
- HTML sitemap: https://nightscape.tokyo/sitemap
- XML sitemap: https://nightscape.tokyo/sitemap.xml
